I heard similar concept a lot recently.

Those people in power love social chaos. The more intense, the better it is. Since they will help justify how great they are. Why? They can legitimately ask for more funding from above to keep things in check and fix the social problems.

In the process, they put $$$$ into their pocket!! The bigger the chaos, the more $$$ , promotion, and reputation will come to them!!

Similar concepts can be applied to Lam and Cheng!!

In a way , more and bigger social chaos help them laterrrrrr !! $, promotion, reputation in the eyes of CCP, etc..

Does it make sense?
